about.label: About us
about.title: A traditional Czech manufacturer of printed adhesive tapes
about.lead: For more than 25 years we have helped companies pack their shipments securely and build a strong brand directly on packaging materials. We specialise in custom printing of adhesive tapes.
about.body1: Our modern production facility allows us to respond flexibly to the needs of both small e-shops and large industrial enterprises. We pride ourselves on precise printing (up to 8 colours), premium adhesive quality (Hot Melt, Acrylic) and fast delivery throughout the Czech Republic.
about.body2: Thanks to ISO 9001 certified processes and the use of ecological, sustainable materials, we are a reliable partner for more than 100 active customers.

references.label: References
references.title: Satisfied customers across industries
references.subtitle: Companies that rely on our printed tapes every day — from e-commerce to manufacturing and healthcare.

lepidla.label: Selection guide
lepidla.title: Which adhesive should you choose?
lepidla.hot_melt_text: The ideal choice for cooler environments and unheated warehouses. It bonds to the substrate extremely quickly and strongly immediately after application. It cannot be easily removed from stretch wrap.
lepidla.acryl_text: Ensures quiet, comfortable unwinding appreciated in large packing halls. Highly resistant to UV radiation and ageing, making it the perfect choice for long-term goods storage.

sustainability.label: Ecology & sustainability
sustainability.title: Sustainable packaging for your e-shop and production
sustainability.subtitle: The environmental footprint of packaging materials is our priority. We develop our adhesive tapes with easy recyclability and minimal environmental impact in mind.
sustainability.card1_text: Our tapes are made from modern BOPP film that is fully recyclable. Unlike older PVC materials, no toxic substances are released during processing and it is gentle on the environment.
sustainability.card2_text: We use exclusively environmentally friendly adhesives. Acrylic adhesives are water-based and Hot Melt technology works without any chemical solvents or synthetic additives.
sustainability.card3_text: Thanks to advanced technology, modern recycling lines can easily separate our tapes from cardboard boxes. Your customers can dispose of used boxes directly in the paper recycling bin without concern.

benefits.security_title: TAMPER EVIDENT tape — tampering is obvious!
benefits.security_text: This security tape looks neutral, but when removed it leaves a warning on the box that is virtually impossible to eliminate. Suitable for all types of cardboard and stretch film, available in various colours and with custom printing.
benefits.glue_text: Tapes with an increased adhesive layer (33% and 20% respectively) and the option of a stronger film than standard, designed for very demanding applications such as heavy parcels, poor-quality cardboard or dusty environments. They bond extremely firmly to cardboard — clear evidence of tampering!

papirove-pasky.title: Paper tapes
papirove-pasky.description: An eco-friendly solution for secure packaging with high adhesion. Ideal for fully recyclable cardboard boxes and clean corporate branding.
papirove-pasky.intro: Paper adhesive tapes combine reliable bonding with maximum environmental responsibility. Thanks to the paper carrier, they are fully recyclable together with cardboard and offer an elegant, clean-looking solution for companies that care about sustainability and the visual impact of their shipments.

properties.Fully recyclable: Tape and cardboard go into the same bin — no need to separate materials.
properties.High adhesion: Reliable bonding even on recycled cardboard and uneven surfaces.
properties.Clean design: The matte paper surface looks premium and can be easily printed with your logo.

bopp-pasky.title: BOPP tapes
bopp-pasky.description: The most widely used industrial packaging tapes made from biaxially oriented polypropylene. Outstanding tensile strength and long service life.
bopp-pasky.intro: BOPP tapes are the standard for everyday packing in manufacturing, logistics and e-commerce. Biaxially oriented polypropylene film delivers an excellent price-performance ratio, availability in acrylic and hot melt versions, and a wide range of widths and colours.

properties.High tensile strength: Durable film that will not tear under tension during packing.
properties.ACRYL and HOT MELT: Choose the adhesive to suit your environment — quiet unwinding or fast bonding in cold conditions.
properties.Long service life: Resistance to UV and ageing for long-term storage.

applications: Printing with company logos and information

bopet-pasky.title: BOPET tapes
bopet-pasky.description: Premium polyester tapes with extreme resistance to tearing, chemicals and temperature fluctuations. Designed for the most demanding industrial applications.
bopet-pasky.intro: BOPET tapes based on polyester film are made for applications where standard tapes are not enough. They withstand high temperatures, aggressive chemicals and mechanical stress while maintaining their properties in extreme conditions.

properties.Temperature resistance: Stable performance at high and low temperatures.
properties.Chemical resistance: Resistant to solvents, oils and harsh environments.
properties.Tear resistance: Strong polyester film with minimal elongation.

textilni-pasky.title: Cloth adhesive tapes
textilni-pasky.description: Highly durable, versatile tapes reinforced with a textile mesh. They grip rough surfaces perfectly, tear easily by hand and are ideal for quick repairs and bundling.
textilni-pasky.intro: Cloth (duct) tapes are an indispensable all-rounder. Textile reinforcement gives them high strength while allowing easy hand tearing without scissors. They adhere reliably even to coarse and uneven surfaces.

properties.Textile reinforcement: High strength and resistance to puncture.
properties.Adhesion on rough surfaces: Bonds to metal, wood, concrete and plastic.

vyztuzene-pasky.title: Reinforced tapes
vyztuzene-pasky.description: Tapes reinforced with longitudinal or cross-laid glass fibres. Maximum strength for securing heavy loads, pallets and oversized parcels.
vyztuzene-pasky.intro: Reinforced (filament) tapes contain glass fibres laid longitudinally or crosswise, dramatically increasing tensile strength. They are designed for securing heavy and oversized shipments where absolute reliability is required.

properties.Glass fibres: Longitudinal or cross reinforcement for maximum strength.
properties.Load capacity: Reliable securing of heavy loads and pallets.

mopp-pasky.title: MOPP tapes
mopp-pasky.description: Monoaxially oriented tapes with extreme strength in one direction and zero elasticity. Specially designed for securing appliances, components or pallet strapping.
mopp-pasky.intro: MOPP tapes feature monoaxially oriented film with extreme longitudinal strength and virtually zero elongation. They replace reinforced tapes where firm securing without glass fibres is needed.

properties.Extreme strength: High tensile strength in one direction.
properties.Zero elasticity: The securing will not loosen under load.

odstranitelne-pasky.title: Removable tapes
odstranitelne-pasky.description: Tapes with a special adhesive formulation that leaves no residue after removal. Ideal for temporary marking, protecting sensitive surfaces or logistics processes.
odstranitelne-pasky.intro: Removable tapes use a special adhesive that holds firmly yet leaves no residue or surface damage when peeled off. They are ideal for temporary applications and protecting sensitive materials.

properties.Residue-free: No adhesive or residue remains after removal.
properties.Surface-friendly: Will not damage paint, glass or sensitive materials.
properties.Reliable hold: Holds for the entire required application period.

applications: Fixation that must be removed again

malirske-pasky.title: Masking tapes
malirske-pasky.description: Crepe paper tapes designed for precise masking during painting and coating. They protect edges from paint bleed and peel off cleanly after the job is done.
malirske-pasky.intro: Masking crepe tapes ensure sharp, clean edges when painting and coating. The crepe paper carrier conforms to the surface, tears easily and removes without adhesive residue after completion.

properties.Sharp edges: Prevents paint from bleeding under the tape.
properties.Clean removal: Leaves no adhesive or marks after use.
properties.Easy application: Crepe conforms to shape and tears easily.

udrzitelne-pasky.title: Sustainable tapes
udrzitelne-pasky.description: Innovative packaging solutions made from recycled materials with minimal environmental impact and support for the circular economy.
udrzitelne-pasky.intro: Our sustainable tape range is made from recycled materials and designed to minimise environmental impact. It helps companies meet ESG goals and build a responsible brand image without compromising performance.

properties.Recycled content: Materials with a high recycled content.
properties.Lower carbon footprint: More sustainable production and circular approach.

applications: Companies with ESG and sustainability goals
